layout.title: EU Digital Product Passport Platform
layout.regulatoryRef: ESPR · Battery Reg 2023/1542 · EU AI Act 2024/1689

home.aiDisclosureTitle: EU AI Act Art. 13 — AI Disclosure:
home.aiDisclosureBody: This platform uses AI agents (Claude Sonnet/Opus 4) to interpret EU regulations. All decisions are logged (Art. 12). Human review required when confidence < 85% (Art. 14).

dpp.title: DPP – {section}
dpp.description: List and detail views for Battery Passport and multi-sector DPPs. Use the API to create and fetch passports.

lifecycle.description: Product lifecycle phases (0–9) per EU DPP Orchestration v3.0. Use the Lifecycle Update API to transition phases.

lifecycleNew.title: New DPP (Lifecycle wizard)
lifecycleNew.description: Phase 0–4: Pre-conception to Manufacturing. Triggers the full DDP Creation workflow (data collection → generate DDP → validate → compliance).

compliance.title: Compliance check
compliance.description: Run compliance verification via the agent workflow (regulatory + product data). EU AI Act Art. 12 audit trail.
compliance.defaultQuery: Is this battery compliant with EU Battery Regulation?

complianceCalendar.title: Compliance calendar
complianceCalendar.description: Regulatory deadlines 2025–2036 (ESPR, Battery Regulation). Plan DPP rollout and reporting.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Traceability
supplyChain.description: Multi-tier supply chain trace from product to raw materials via Neo4j knowledge graph. Battery Regulation Article 49 – due diligence traceability.
supplyChain.noUpstream: No upstream nodes found. Seed data or add supply chain relationships in Neo4j.

humanReview.title: Human review queue (live)
humanReview.description: EU AI Act Article 14 – human-in-the-loop for decisions with confidence < 85%. Polls /api/v1/human-review/pending every 5s.
humanReview.noItems: No items in queue. When the workflow escalates (confidence 0.70–0.85 or < 0.70), tasks will appear here for approval or override.

audit.title: Audit log (live)
audit.description: EU AI Act Article 12 – record-keeping. Entries from PostgreSQL audit_log. Polls every 10s. Retention: 10 years.
audit.noEntries: No audit entries yet. Agent decisions will appear here.

ml.title: ML compliance predictions
ml.description: Real-time predictions via v2 GradientBoosting models (ESPR, RoHS, REACH, carbon, circularity). EU AI Act Art. 9, 10, 15.

agentRegistry.title: Agent Registry
agentRegistry.description: EU AI Act Art. 13 — All AI agents, their capabilities, tools, and compliance references. Full transparency.
agentRegistry.skillsDescription: All capabilities across agents. Each skill is linked to the agents that provide it.
agentRegistry.toolsDescription: All tools available to agents: databases, ML models, APIs, validators, and generators.
agentRegistry.assistantPlaceholder: Ask this agent anything about its domain of expertise…

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.placeholder: Ask me anything about this page...
assistant.systemPlaceholder: Ask anything or give a command...
assistant.welcomeSubtitle: I can execute workflows, query agents, and answer your regulatory questions.

productReport.title: Product History Report
productReport.subtitle: Full traceability for insurance, compliance audit, and lifecycle management.
productReport.notFound: Report not available — create the DPP first via Command Center.

commandCenter.title: Command Center
commandCenter.description: One-click pipeline: DPP Creation → Compliance Check → QR Generation → Blockchain Anchoring. All 16 agents orchestrated automatically.
commandCenter.queryPlaceholder: e.g. Is this product compliant with Battery Regulation?
commandCenter.pipelineSummary: DPP created, compliance verified, QR generated, and blockchain anchored.

workflows.title: Workflow Registry
workflows.description: Pre-built and custom workflows from agents, tools, and skills. Each workflow orchestrates multiple agents via LangGraph.
workflows.builderDesc: Select agents to create a custom workflow pipeline. Each agent brings its skills and tools.
workflows.actionPlaceholder: Describe what this agent should do...

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.description: Generate QR codes, NFC payloads, and RFID encodings for any product. GS1 Digital Link compliant (ISO/IEC 18004).
qr.howDesc: Generate all EU DPP data carrier formats from a single GTIN/serial pair. Each format links to the product's Digital Product Passport.

connectors.title: Connector Registry
connectors.description: Connect enterprise systems (ERP, MES, PLM, IoT) for automated DPP creation from manufacturing and R&D processes.
connectors.step1: Register your enterprise system connector (SAP, Siemens, Oracle, IoT...)
connectors.step2: Configure field mapping from your schema to DPP schema
connectors.step3: Enable webhook or polling for automatic data ingestion
connectors.step4: DPP created automatically via 6-agent workflow + blockchain anchored
connectors.name: Name

blockchain.title: Blockchain DPP Security
blockchain.description: SHA-256 hash anchoring with Merkle tree for DPP integrity verification. Tamper-proof product passport records.
blockchain.howDesc: Each DPP is hashed (SHA-256), anchored in a Merkle tree, and chained to previous blocks for immutable integrity.
blockchain.howStep1: DPP data is hashed with SHA-256 (deterministic canonical JSON)
blockchain.howStep2: Hash is added to Merkle tree and linked to previous block
blockchain.howStep3: Verify any DPP by re-hashing and checking against the chain
blockchain.verifiedOk: Integrity verified — DPP is authentic and untampered
blockchain.verifiedFail: Verification failed — DPP hash not found or data tampered

landing.heroBadge: EU AI Act · ESPR · Battery Regulation Compliant
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered agentic platform for EU regulatory compliance. 16 specialized agents orchestrate DPP creation, validation, and lifecycle management across 8 product sectors.
landing.capSubtitle: End-to-end Digital Product Passport management with AI-powered compliance verification.
landing.cap1Desc: Create and manage Digital Product Passports for batteries, electronics, textiles, vehicles, construction, furniture, plastics, and chemicals.
landing.cap2Desc: AI agents interpret ESPR, Battery Regulation, REACH, RoHS, and WEEE with EUR-Lex citations and automated gap analysis.
landing.cap3Desc: Multi-tier supply chain trace via Neo4j knowledge graph. Battery Reg Art. 49 due diligence with EPCIS 2.0 events.
landing.cap4Desc: LangGraph multi-agent system with supervisor, quality gates, and human-in-the-loop. Claude Sonnet/Opus 4 powered.
landing.cap5Desc: GradientBoosting v2 models predict ESPR, RoHS, REACH compliance, carbon footprint, and circularity index.
landing.cap6Desc: 9-phase product lifecycle from pre-conception to destruction. Second-life assessment, recycling, and end-of-life management.
landing.cap7Desc: EU AI Act Art. 12 compliant record-keeping. Hash chain integrity, 10-year retention, decision logging with confidence scores.
landing.cap8Desc: EU AI Act Art. 14 human-in-the-loop. Automatic escalation when AI confidence drops below 85%. Live review queue.
landing.demoSectionSubtitle: Watch the 6-agent DPP creation workflow in action.
landing.demoSubtitle: 6 agents collaborate to create a compliant Digital Product Passport
landing.agentsSubtitle: Each agent has dedicated skills, tools, and compliance expertise. EU AI Act Art. 13 — full transparency.
landing.compSubtitle: Full alignment with EU AI Act, ESPR, and Battery Regulation.
landing.sectorsSubtitle: Multi-sector DPP support from day one.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to create your first Digital Product Passport?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start with a free demo or contact us for enterprise deployment.
landing.footerDesc: Agentic AI platform for EU Digital Product Passport compliance. Multi-sector (batteries, electronics, textiles, vehicles) with 16-agent LangGraph architecture and full EU AI Act 2024/1689 alignment.

reports.title: EU Compliance Reports
reports.description: Compliance status per EU regulation article. EU AI Act Annex IV technical documentation. Each report links to the responsible agent and API endpoint.
